name: Andhra Cements Limited
summary: Andhra Cements Limited manufactures and sells cement and cement related products primarily in India. The company offers ordinary Portland, Portland Pozolana, and Portland slag cement products. It sells its products through a network of dealers and agents. The company was formerly known as Andhra Cement Company Limited and changed its name to Andhra Cements Limited in December 1990. The company was incorporated in 1936 and is based in Guntur, India. Andhra Cements Limited is a subsidiary of Jaypee Development Corporation Limited.
